name: openai-ralph-codex
description: Codex plugin packaging for the Ralph PRD-driven planning, execution, verification, and recovery loop.

interface.shortDescription: PRD-driven Codex workflow with planning, verification, and recovery.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Ralph CLI as a Codex plugin surface so the agent can plan tasks from a PRD, execute the next bounded task, verify output, inspect state, and resume blocked work.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Ralph for this repo and generate the first task plan.
Show Ralph status and tell me the safest next command to run.
Run the next Ralph task and summarize verification evidence.
